results.rendered_html:
saṃ-√takṣ P. -takṣati (rarely Ā. ˚te), to cut out together, cut out, form or fashion by cutting,  ŚrS. ;  VarBṛS. ;
to compose, construct (hymns),  RV. ii, 31, 7 ;
to cut through, cut to pieces, wound,  MBh. ;
to hurt with words,  Pāṇ. iii, 1, 76 , Sch.

results.rendered_html:
saṃtakṣ 1 P.
1 To pare off, chisel, chop.
2 To wound, hurt, strike; nistriṃśābhyāṃ sutīkṣṇābhyāmanyonyaṃ saṃtatakṣatuḥ  Mb. ;  Bṛ. S. 42. 29. 
3 To hurt by words.
4 Ved. To compose (hymns &c.).
